commit.subject: LU-20071 kernel: RHEL 9.8 server support
commit.message:
LU-20071 kernel: RHEL 9.8 server support

This patch makes changes to support RHEL 9.8 release
with kernel 5.14.0-687.5.1.el9_8 for Lustre server.

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.8 serverdistro=el9.8 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.8 serverdistro=el9.8 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.8 serverdistro=el9.8 testgroup=full-dne-part-1

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.8 serverdistro=el9.8 testgroup=full-dne-part-2

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.8 serverdistro=el9.8 testgroup=full-dne-part-3

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.8 serverdistro=el9.8 testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-1

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.8 serverdistro=el9.8 testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-2

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.8 serverdistro=el9.8 testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-3

Change-Id: I2706d7401aa8ba9de2a5caae87cf406fb7639eca
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
